title: Implementation Plan
description: Ordered implementation plan produced by /synthesize-implementation. Reconciles arch.json with validation.json into concrete /code directives.

spec_summary.description: From arch.json — one-line summary of what's being built

acceptance_criteria.description: Cross-cutting acceptance criteria and Definition of Done items that apply to the module as a whole — not matched to any specific component.

plan_items.description: Ordered list of /code directives. Empty array if all components are reused.

id.description: Plan item ID for readability and depends_on references (e.g., plan-001)

action.description: create: new file (no file field). modify: change existing file (file field required).

file.description: Path to existing file to modify. Required for action: modify. Omitted for action: create.

directive.description: Natural language instruction for /code — what to build or change

depends_on.description: Plan item IDs that must complete before this item

component.description: Name of the arch.json component this item implements or modifies

notes.description: Human-readable context — why this action was chosen, what reconciliation decided

acceptance_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria this plan item must fulfill — verbatim from spec. For modify actions, only unsatisfied criteria (not already met by existing code).

design_references.description: Design assets relevant to this plan item — inline mockups/diagrams or file paths.

design_decisions.description: Design decisions from the spec that apply to this plan item — constraints the code agent must respect.

reconciliation_decisions.description: One entry per arch.json component documenting the reconciliation outcome

action.description: Resolved outcome: reuse (no plan item), create (new file), modify (change existing)

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this decision was made

existing_file.description: Path to existing file if action is reuse or modify. Null if action is create.

modify.description: Components that need changes to existing files

reuse.description: Components with no plan item — existing types are sufficient
